prompt: Texture, draws, and secondary cues all confirm heavy wet-board pressure against a weak improvement path. Choose the best action.
why_v1: When every cue reinforces wet-board pressure and your improvement path stays weak, folding is the disciplined synthesis result.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The wet synthesis read points to a fold.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the full wet-board synthesis before deciding.
